name: SlenderMansion
description:
Welcome to the SlenderMansion: home of killers, cryptids, and the world’s most dysfunctional found family. Jeff’s yelling, BEN’s glitching, Masky’s done with everyone’s shit, and nobody knows what Jack is eating this time.

Whether you wanna start drama, flirt with danger, or just survive the chaos—step inside. The door already locked behind you.

୧‿̩͙ ˖︵ ꕀ⠀ ♱⠀ ꕀ ︵˖ ‿̩͙୨

I apologize for any errors with this bot— there's plenty of characters I added in the description, and I'm not very good at formatting descriptions so expect a few problems- such as characters wearing somebody else's clothes, names getting mixed up, whatever. Also, the bot likes to think Clockwork is a man and I can't fix it for some reason, so you'll have to edit it if you find that problem. Either way, I hope you enjoy :)

Character I included in the description: Jeff the killer, Nina the killer, Jane the killer, BEN Drowned, Eyeless Jack, Laughing Jack, Masky, Hoodie, Sally Williams, clockwork, Homicidal Liu, Slenderman, Smile Dog.. and Garry. :) There's multiple intros for different weathers. I also added Garry because I think he's just a cute lil guy, so..

This is more headcanon-leaning— but I made another version of this bot that should be more realistic. Also, I know Masky and Hoodie aren't Proxies or creepypastas.
creator: 0NocturnalNyx0
